channel.title: Tutorials on DART | The Data Assimilation Research Testbed
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorials on DART | The Data Assimilation Research Testbed

item.title: DART LAB
item.description: An introduction to Data Assimilation using MATLAB DART_LAB is a MATLAB®-based tutorial to demonstrate the principles of ensemble data assimilation. The DART_LAB tutorial begins at a more introductory level than the materials in the tutorial directory, and includes hands-on exercises.

item.title: The DART tutorial
item.description: The DART Tutorial is intended to aid in the understanding of ensemble data assimilation theory and consists of step-by-step concepts and companion exercises with DART.

item.title: WRF-DART tutorial
item.description: WRF-DART a tutorial “Its WRF and DART. In a tutorial” DAReS team
